changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Magatama Miracle"

TextENGNew: ``...Anyway, a matchmaking magatama, huh?@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3027. Depending how it's used, that might be able to lead toward world peace.``
``World peeeace?@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3038. That seems like a rather large-scale proposal.@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3039. Just how might you go about that?``

``Here's what you do.@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3029. Give it to the leaders of two countries that are in the middle of some kinda dispute.@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3030. That way, they'd be able to get along and live happily ever after.``

``...There's no way that would solve all of a country's problems.@k@vS20/04/VTT_satoko3017. Even if the higher ups are able to reconcile, it won't change anything unless the people around them are able to come to an agreement.@k@vS20/04/VTT_satoko3018. The two of them would just be forced out of their jobs, don't you think?``

``Plus, that magatama only gives you one-sided affection with no consideration for your partner's feelings.@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3022. I think that's a little different from genuinely liking someone.@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3023. That's more like dependence or servitude... not a very happy feeling.``
``Ultimately, love is only possible when two people like and understand one another, that's what Rena thinks.``

``Well, in that sense, if national change is too much to ask for, then the same could probably be said for trust between friends.@k@vS20/06/VTT_shion3002. Using some convenient tool to make people like each other without any reason or rationale just sounds too good to be true.``
``In the end, even if it's unrefined, the important thing is developing mutual understanding.``

``Hmm~, understanding, huh?@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3032. That's an easy thing to say, but pretty tough to actually do.@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3033. You might think you're trying to be considerate of someone close to you, but in a lot of cases they were thinking something completely different...``

``Maybe it's arrogant to be thinking for someone else's sake in the first place.@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3041. Because when you think like that, you're totally putting yourself on a higher pedestal than the other person.``
``In which case, there are times when it's better to share our true feelings with one another so we can deepen our understanding of each other.``
``...This story is very deep. Meep.``

``...Hohoh?@k@vS20/06/VTT_shion3005. Then Sis, why don't you share your true feelings with Kei-chan, right here and now?@k@vS20/06/VTT_shion3006. You might be surprised how deeply you'll be able to understand one another~.``
``Huh?@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3044. N-no, well, th-this and that are, umm...``
``Hmm?@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3035. What is it, Mion? You've got something to tell me?@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3036. Go ahead and say it.``
``Th-th-th-there's no way I can say thaaaat!!``

``...@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3038. Hey Rena... why did Mion just beat me and then storm out?@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3039. Right, maybe this is another thing I should be asking the person in question directly?``
``I wondeeer?@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3026. Rena doesn't knoooow~♪.``
``Unbelievable...@k@vS20/06/VTT_shion3008. Are they both equally clueless?@k@vS20/06/VTT_shion3009. The road ahead is going to be full of difficulties.``
``...Although, perhaps expecting Keiichi-san to be more understanding on this matter is too much to ask for.``
``That is the cliche for a galge protagonist, nipah☆.``
